SHORT NAME: HSEHLD_SIZE_CD 

LONG NAME: HSEHLD_SIZE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 01 = 1 person 
02 = 2 people 
03 = 3 people 
04 = 4 people 
05 = 5 people 
06 = 6 people 
07 = 7 people 
08 = 8 or more people 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown
